parsed_output.justification: Daniel admitted to being the Minion, and Kevin claimed to be the Troublemaker who swapped Daniel and Jessica. If Jessica started as the Werewolf and was swapped with Daniel (the Minion), Daniel would end the game as the Werewolf.
